role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed crop types (maize) and forest biomes.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road surface and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain knowledge regarding utility poles and image quality.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the United States. The agents adhered strictly to their domains, providing grounded evidence (maize stubble, wooden poles) that effectively narrowed the candidates to North America, leading to a correct final decision.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of rolling hills, gravel road, and autumn colors match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Identification of maize stubble and deciduous trees is visually supported.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Observations of the unpaved road and wooden pole are accurate.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Assessment of the pole style and image quality is consistent with the visual data.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The final prediction was correct (United States).
